title: Slime Origin
description: Adds a Slime Origin to the Origins mod. Based on Jack Sibley's mod of the same name.
body:
# Slime Origin
Adds a Slime Origin to the Origins mod. Based on Jack Sibley's mod of the same name. 

## Powers
- Bounciness
  - You bounce on any block as if it were a Slime block.
- Better Jump
  - Your Slime heritage gives you an improved leap at the cost of a reduced movement speed.
- Fragmentation
  - When others would die, twice per life, you will shrink to half your size.
- Melting
  - Slime doesn't last very long in hot weather; you will burn when exposed to the sun in hot biomes.
- Slime Skin
  - You have the green, translucent skin of a Slime.

# Building from source
Download the source over here at [GitHub](https://github.com/weightedangelcube/slime-origin), then run `gradlew runClient` through your favourite shell.

You can also grab a build off of the latest commit [here](https://github.com/weightedangelcube/slime-origin/actions/workflows/build.yml).

# Depending on this project
JitPack is being set up, sit tight!
